title: Trailer Feel
description: This pack aims to recreate the amazing visuals of the Minecraft Trailers inside the vanilla game.
body:
### Information
This is a faithfull recreation of the Trailers for Minecraft in the vanilla style. This modpack is inspired by Low Res's modpack but with more mods, visual content and more!


### Performance
Trailer Feel is faster than most competing game clients, thanks to modern performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others.


### Tutorial on how to get the right shader settings
Go to this link to get the BSL settings link by Low Res [here](https://www.mediafire.com/file/xf2lf5mjtf6b05x/BSL_v8.2.06.zip.txt/file)
